title: phyllanthus salviifolius
intro: Phyllanthus salviifolius, also known as the sage-leaf tree, is a small tree or shrub native to the tropical regions of the world. It is a plant species that has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phyllanthus salviifolius include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce oxidative stress and improve liver function. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus salviifolius include tea, tincture, and infusion, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems of the plant in hot water or a solvent.
